nasb.text: God came to Balaam at night and said to him, “If the men have come to call you, rise up and go with them; but only the word which I speak to you shall you do.”

esv.text: And God came to Balaam at night and said to him, “If the men have come to call you, rise, go with them; but only do what I tell you.”

cnv.text: 當夜，　神來到巴蘭那裡，對他說：“這些人既然來請你，你就起程與他們同去，但是你只要遵行我吩咐你的事。”

ccb.text: 当夜，上帝来对巴兰说：“这些人既然来请你，你就跟他们去吧，但你只可照我说的做。”
